narrative:
Delaware municipal court district has 166,040 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.5% D−R vs -25.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
